title: ASR Federal Counterfeit Bill Detector Pen US and International Currency Marker
description:
Are you looking to detect counterfeit currency without bearing the cost of expensive gadgets? Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you. This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit. If the bill you test has a yellow/colorless mark, it is real. If the mark is black, it is fake

ASR Federal Counterfeit Bill Detector Pen US and International Currency Marker

Are you looking to detect counterfeit currency without bearing the cost of expensive gadgets? Then the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen is the perfect tool for you.

This detector pen is filled with an iodine-based ink designed to be applied to banknotes in an attempt to determine authenticity. Most genuine banknotes are printed on paper made with cotton fibers and do not contain the starches that are reactive with iodine, so when the pen is used to mark genuine bills the mark will be yellowish or colorless. Counterfeit bills, however, are typically printed on photocopier paper or standard printer paper, so the ink from this pen will change to black if the bill is counterfeit. If the bill you test has a yellow/colorless mark, it is real. If the mark is black, it is fake.

Key Features

  • COUNTERFEIT DETECTION INK - Filled with Iodine-based Ink Designed to Determine Currency Authenticity | Yellow Mark = Real, Black Mark = Counterfeit
  • RESULTS WITHIN SECONDS - Fast-acting Detection Ink Determines Authenticity Immediately | Catch Crooks Quickly without Inconveniencing Honest Customers
  • INK FADES QUICKLY - Ink Fades within Hours of Being Marked | Wont Ruin Genuine Currency or Prevent it From Being Used Later
  • WORKS ON US AND INTERNATIONAL CURRENCY: Compatible with Bill Currencies in Argentina, Brazil, Britain, Euro Countries, Hong Kong, Japan, Korea, Macao, Malaysia, New Zealand, Russia, South Africa, Taiwan, Thailand and USA
  • PROTECT YOUR BUSINESS - Inexpensive Way to Determine Authenticity at Point of Sale | Must-have Anti-counterfeit Detection Device for Business Owners, Entrepreneurs, Bank Tellers and Law Enforcement Officers

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRFCDPBLK
  • UPC: 855569007645
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 5.5 in

Our counterfeit currency detector pen will provide results within seconds, and the mark will fade completely within a few hours. The ink will work on the following international paper currencies:

Argentia - Peso Brazil - Cruzero Britain - Pound Euro Countries - Euro Hong Kong - Dollar Japan - Yen Korea - Won Macao - Dollar Malaysia - Dollar New Zealand - Dollar Russia - Ruble South Africa - Rand Taiwan - NT Dollar Thailand - Baht USA - Dollar

Counterfeiting is estimated to cost US businesses $200 billion annually, so having an active way to check for counterfeit currency at the point of sale is any business owner's best protection. With the ASR Federal Counterfeit Banknote Detection Pen, you can protect your business from counterfeiters without shelling out for expensive anti-counterfeiting systems. This pen is also a great option for entrepreneurs, bank tellers, and law enforcement officers. Make sure to grab one of these for yourself, or buy a set to supply to your employees and protect your business from counterfeiters!
